title: Dimensional Anchor
description: A mod that gives teleportation functionality to Lodestones
body:
In the world of Minecraft...

Adventurers seek out powerful artifacts and magical items to aid them on their quests. One such item is the Lodestone, a rare and expensive block that only the most skilled artisans can craft, making use of one of the rarest ingots in the world. And for what? To make compasses point towards it. As you can imagine, many adventurers find the Lodestone to be a useless trinket, a symbol of the excesses of the wealthy.

But fear not, for a new artifact has been discovered: the Dimensional Anchor.

With this powerful artifact installed, the Lodestone becomes much more than a mere decorative item. It becomes a gateway to another dimension, a beacon of hope for those seeking to teleport across great distances.

To use the Dimensional Anchor, adventurers must first link their compass to a Lodestone by right-clicking on it.

Then, with the linked compass in hand, they must charge it up by holding down the right mouse button. The power required to teleport varies depending on the distance and dimension, so adventurers must be careful not to overtax their reserves of experience points.

Costs:

  • If both the player and the Lodestone are in the same dimension, teleportation costs 5 levels of experience points (configurable).
  • If the player and the Lodestone are in different dimensions, teleportation costs 30 levels of experience points (configurable).

Risks:

  • Attempting to teleport without enough experience points can result in one of the following penalties:
    • Taking 1-5 points of damage and being teleported normally.
    • Having the compass break and nothing happening.
    • Being teleported to a random valid location within a 50-block radius around the Lodestone in any dimension, losing all experience points.
  • If the player and the Lodestone are in different dimensions, the risks are greater and the player will certainly take 5-10 points of damage, the compass will break, and then it will randomly suffer one of these extra effects:
    • Nothing happens.
    • The player gets teleported to a random location in the same dimension.
    • The player gets teleported to a random dimension in the same coordinates.
    • The player gets teleported to a random dimension and coordinates.

Note: If installed on the client, there will be a decreasing field of view (FOV) effect displayed when charging up the Lodestone compass. And while there are no plans for a Forge version, mod developers interested in making a Forge version can send a direct message to the creator.

Note for Modpack Makers

You're free to use our mods in your Modpacks so long the download is redirected either to here or CurseForge. No credit is necessary, although appreciated! Thanks for using our mods!
